CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2014 Continued To Jan-28-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jak Steven Marquez, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DONALD WOO and ALFRED LEE.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ROBIN RODRIGUEZ.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiffs Donald Woo and Alfred Lee sworn and examinded on their own behalf.
Patrick Lee, Jurt Ginter, and Michale Bentley sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
The following exhbits were introduce by the plaintiff and admitted in evidence:
Plaintiffs' Exhibit A. Residencial Lease.
Plaintiffs' Exhibit B. Report from Private Investigator.
Plaintiffs' Exhibit C. Report from Private Investigator.
Plaintiffs' Exhibit D. Report from Private Investigator.
Plaintiffs' Exhibit E. Copy of hand written document.
Plaintiff's Ecdence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

The court entered a Judgment for Declaratory Relief. Judgment signed in open court.
See scanned document.
The court ordered original Plaintiffs' Exhibits returned to counsel for the care and custody of the court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2014 Continued To Dec-17-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
